twitter_thread: Last month, 4,200 Bloodpoint Bot users got banned for using outdated scripts.
DBD-AutoGrind-Trainer-2026 has 12,000 downloads, but its detection rate is 43%.
Use a script with ESP wallhack and aimbot, like jose-90's trainer, to reduce detection.
AdilMir1433's and deltabarbershopofficial-cloud's trainers have similar features, but differ in update frequency.
The 'Extreme' edition of deltabarbershopofficial-cloud's trainer costs $50, but is it worth the 30% increased detection risk?
A reliable Bloodpoint Bot script can save 25 hours of grinding per week, equal to 1,300 Bloodpoints.
What's your experience with Bloodpoint Bot scripts? #deadbydaylight #bloodpointbot
